scope: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 phantom code + BUGFIX-027 echo_memory wiring + 3rd GM few-shot + BUGFIX-028 PROGRESS_MISSION parser

bugs_found.description: PHANTOM: C16 status claimed build_context_enrichment() formats echo_memory/tension_zone/convergence_zone for LLM narrative context, but the function was NEVER edited. Only contains tension, player_tendency, talent_names. Cross-run death memory, MOS convergence zone, and veteran status were all missing from LLM prompts.
bugs_found.fix: Wired echo_memory (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen), tension_zone (MOS convergence), total_runs (veteran status) into build_context_enrichment(). Also added these keys to build_narrative_context() in merlin_llm_adapter.gd.

bugs_found.description: PROGRESS_MISSION effects from LLM silently rejected by _try_parse_effects_dict(). Condition checks eff.has('amount') but PROGRESS_MISSION uses 'step' key. All PROGRESS_MISSION effects generated by GM brain would be dropped, replaced by HEAL_LIFE fallback.
bugs_found.fix: Added explicit PROGRESS_MISSION handling before the generic amount-based branch. Clamps step to 1-3.

overall_assessment: Cycle 17: Found 1 HIGH phantom bug (C16 echo_memory wiring never implemented) + 1 MEDIUM parser bug (PROGRESS_MISSION rejected). Both fixed. Added 3rd GM few-shot example (end-game). 27 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles.
